# terrible_community_general_pacemaker_resource (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `name` (String) Specify the resource name to create or clone to. This is required if `state=present`, `state=absent`, `state=enabled`, or `state=disabled`.
- `resource_argument` (String) Action to associate with resource.
- `resource_clone_ids` (String) List of clone resource IDs to clone from.
- `resource_clone_meta` (String) List of metadata to associate with clone resource.
- `resource_meta` (String) List of meta to associate with resource.
- `resource_operation` (String) List of operations to associate with resource.
- `resource_option` (String) Specify the resource option to create.
- `resource_type` (String) Resource type to create.
- `state` (String) Indicate desired state for cluster resource. The states `cleanup` and `cloned` have been added in community.general 11.3.0. If `state=cloned` or `state=present`, you can set `resource_clone_ids` and `resource_clone_meta` to determine exactly what and how to clone.
- `wait` (Number) Timeout period for polling the resource creation.

### Read-Only

- `cluster_resources` (String) The cluster resource output message.
